mission: Drive the @beep/ui Storybook Guide checklist from 0% (all skipped) to 100% completion through real repo work, verified in the live guide UI via Claude-in-Chrome.

target.launch: bun run storybook (portless storybook.beep; dynamic port, observed 4884)

phaseStatusMeaning.completed: Every item in the phase reads Done in the live guide and supporting repo work is committed.
phaseStatusMeaning.pending: The phase is ready for an implementation agent to execute.
phaseStatusMeaning.blocked: The phase cannot proceed without a named dependency (e.g. CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN) or approval.

keyDecisions.decision: Target literal 100% of the rendered guide items, including the externally-gated ones (Vercel publish and Chromatic visual tests).
keyDecisions.rationale: The user wants the guide fully completed, not a subset.

keyDecisions.decision: Each item is satisfied by the genuine work it represents and verified in the live guide UI.
keyDecisions.rationale: The guide is a forcing function for a real Storybook buildout, not a checklist to fake.

keyDecisions.decision: publishStorybook is satisfied by a Vercel deployment on storybook.yeebois.com provisioned by the infra/storybook Pulumi stack, with A+ Mozilla Observatory headers from packages/foundation/ui-system/ui/vercel.json. Not Chromatic.
keyDecisions.rationale: The user chose a durable hosted Storybook on their own domain with the same security posture as @beep/oip-web.

keyDecisions.decision: installVisualTests and visualTests use Chromatic via @chromatic-com/storybook.
keyDecisions.rationale: The two visual-test items have no non-Chromatic path.

keyDecisions.decision: The Vercel publish (pulumi up) and any Chromatic visual-baseline run require explicit per-action approval; all credentials resolve from 1Password at execution time and are never committed.
keyDecisions.rationale: These actions deploy to / upload the built Storybook to external services.

keyDecisions.decision: The live /settings/guide rendering is the authoritative item set, re-read at execution start.
keyDecisions.rationale: Storybook may render a different item set than the source enumerates; act on what the running guide shows.

knownGaps: Storybook source defines installVitest, installA11y, installDocs, guidedTour, and onboardingSurvey, which are not rendered as discrete items in this install and are out of the active inventory.
No stories exist yet; renderComponent/moreComponents/moreStories all start from zero.
The exact completion threshold heuristics (e.g. what counts as 'changed a control') are Storybook-internal; confirm completion by re-reading the live guide.

P4 publish is blocked on interactive auth: 1Password is not signed in (op whoami fails), and the Pulumi DIY backend s3://oip-law-pulumi-state returns 403 AccessDenied behind a ForceMFA policy (needs an MFA-authenticated AWS session).
The Cloudflare API token oip-web uses is not discoverable in .env or infra/; it must be exported as CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN at deploy time, else the storybook.yeebois.com CNAME is skipped.
CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN is not yet provided; P3 visual-test runs are blocked until it is.
The static vercel.json CSP targets A+ but is unverified against the live Storybook; it may need script hashes if Storybook fails to boot under script-src 'self'.

credentials.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: same credential @beep/oip-web uses (reference not yet located)

prerequisites: MFA-authenticated AWS session for the Pulumi s3://oip-law-pulumi-state backend

phases.name: Bootstrap & Inventory Refresh
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Storybook running, live statuses reconciled with the SPEC inventory, and no item left in the skipped state.

phases.name: Story Authoring
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: renderComponent, moreComponents, moreStories, controls, viewports, organizeStories, autodocs, and mdxDocs read Done; stories/MDX committed and package lint/check passes.

phases.name: In-UI Testing
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: runTests, interactionTests, accessibilityTests, and coverage read Done via the test widget.

phases.name: Visual Testing (Chromatic-gated)
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: @chromatic-com/storybook installed and committed; visualTests run against Chromatic or reported blocked when no token is supplied.

phases.name: Publish & CI
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Storybook deployed to Vercel on storybook.yeebois.com (A+ Observatory) via the infra/storybook Pulumi stack, or reported blocked; a CI workflow runs the Storybook Vitest project; publishStorybook and ciTests read Done.

phases.name: AI Setup, What's-New & Final Verification
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: aiSetup and whatsNewStorybook10 read Done; the live guide reports 100% with no remaining skipped/open items and all repo work committed.

verification.description: Claude-in-Chrome read of /settings/guide shows every inventoried item Done and the guide at 100%.

packages/foundation/ui-system/ui/stories/ contains >=5 distinct components and >=20 stories, including args/controls, viewports, grouped titles, autodocs tag, a play() interaction, and an introduction.mdx.
storybook.yeebois.com serves the deployed Storybook via the infra/storybook Pulumi stack and grades A+ on Mozilla Observatory, or the item is explicitly reported blocked on missing creds/approval.
@chromatic-com/storybook is a committed dependency; visual tests exist via Chromatic, or the blocked state is explicitly reported.
A GitHub Actions workflow runs the Storybook Vitest project.
Affected lint/check gates pass for @beep/ui and @beep/infra; new stories, vercel.json, the infra/storybook stack, and the workflow are committed.

stopConditions: The live /settings/guide item set materially contradicts the SPEC inventory and cannot be reconciled.
Completing an item would exceed the named scope or require unrelated refactors.

An externally-gated action lacks its credential or approval: the Vercel publish (op signin + MFA-authenticated AWS session + Vercel/Cloudflare tokens + per-action approval) or a Chromatic baseline (CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN + per-action approval).
The same blocker repeats after reasonable investigation.
nextAction: Execute P0: start Storybook, re-read /settings/guide via Chrome, reconcile the inventory, and un-skip all items.
